ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size chart is applicable (e.g., USA, EU) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the size chart */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line it belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart it belongs to */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_inch" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_inch" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_cm" REAL /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_inch" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "neck_cm" REAL /* Neck measurement in centimeters */,
  "neck_inch" REAL /* Neck measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_inch" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_inch" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_inch" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., USA, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region it belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product line is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement guideline */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line it belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guideline is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guideline was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the guideline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_guidelines_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reporting the issue */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart related to the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing issue */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue resolution (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line it belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was reported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_issues_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_issues_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)
